DISEASE.name: Disease Distribution
DISEASE.description: Calculates the overall prevalence and count of each diagnosis in the dataset.

DISEASE.name: Top Diseases
DISEASE.description: Identifies the top 5 most frequent diagnoses.

DISEASE.name: Disease Ranking
DISEASE.description: Ranks diagnoses based on caseload size.

AGE.name: Age Histogram
AGE.description: Bins patient ages into statistical intervals to show age distribution.

AGE.name: Age Groups Distribution
AGE.description: Groups patients into demographic age cohorts (e.g. pediatric, adult, geriatric).

AGE.name: Average Age
AGE.description: Calculates the arithmetic average age of the patients cohort.

AGE.name: Median Age
AGE.description: Calculates the median age of the patients cohort.

AGE.name: Age Distribution Analysis
AGE.description: Analyzes the overall spread, skewness, and variance of patient age.

GENDER.name: Gender Distribution
GENDER.description: Calculates percentage and count breakdown of patient gender demographics.

ADMISSION_DATE.name: Daily Admission Trend
ADMISSION_DATE.description: Plots chronological daily patient admission counts.

ADMISSION_DATE.name: Weekly Admission Trend
ADMISSION_DATE.description: Aggregates admission frequencies into weekly intervals.

ADMISSION_DATE.name: Monthly Admission Trend
ADMISSION_DATE.description: Analyzes monthly patient admissions to capture macro trends and seasonality.

ADMISSION_DATE.name: Quarterly Admission Trend
ADMISSION_DATE.description: Tracks quarterly workload spikes and metrics.

ADMISSION_DATE.name: Admissions Moving Average
ADMISSION_DATE.description: Applies a 7-day rolling window average to smooth out daily noise in admissions.

ADMISSION_DATE.name: Admissions Growth Rate
ADMISSION_DATE.description: Calculates week-over-week or month-over-month growth rate percentage in admissions.

LOCATION.name: Location Distribution
LOCATION.description: Groups counts of patients by geographical location/zipcode.

LOCATION.name: Regional Comparison
LOCATION.description: Compares health metrics and volume across patient regions.

LOCATION.name: Geographical Heatmap Candidate
LOCATION.description: Prepares coordinate mapping inputs for geographical heatmaps.

OUTCOME.name: Recovery Rate
OUTCOME.description: Computes the percentage of patients successfully discharged or recovered.

OUTCOME.name: Mortality Rate
OUTCOME.description: Computes the percentage of patient mortality cases registered.

OUTCOME.name: Outcome Distribution
OUTCOME.description: Tabulates counts and ratios of all clinical outcomes.

SEVERITY.name: Severity Distribution
SEVERITY.description: Plots the caseload distribution across clinical triage severity levels.

conditional.name: Disease Trend
conditional.description: Tracks specific diagnosis incidence trends over time.
